text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After spending some time out with Grass
Wonder...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Look at that, Trainer. The setting sun's reflection
on the river is so beautiful.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Splash!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh? Did something just fall in?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... I was so sure this scenery would jog my
memory! Grrr!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Taiki? What are you up to?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Grass! I'm just here rackin' my brain over
somethin' I forgot from earlier! It's drivin' me nuts!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I wonder what it could be...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
It's some Japanese poem I learned in class! It's got
somethin' to do about a frog fallin' in some water.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Don'tcha worry, though. That splash ya heard just
now was a stone I threw, not a frog. Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh, is it the haiku written by the famous poet
Matsuo Basho?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Uhhh... The name kinda rings a bell...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But the Japanese was kinda complex, so I can't
remember what it meant!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh dear...
choice_data_list: Why not tell her in English?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Well, I declare! Givin' me the English is sure to do
the trick!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Very well. If I recall correctly...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
By an old pondside, A frog leaps and breaks the
still With watery thump.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh! That's the one! No doubt about it!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
It's such a beautiful poem! Like that wabi-sabi
whatchamacallit, right?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yes. I think it's expressed well in English too.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Its form and rhythm creates a faithful
representation of the original, allowing the haiku
to touch the hearts and minds of people around
the world.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: That's right! It's super pretty!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Well, that sure takes a load off of my shoulders!
Thanks a bunch!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
One can always count on a proper Nadeshiko gal
like you havin' your studies all in order!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'll catch y'all at a later time. I'm fixin' to go
hunt some jumpin' frogs!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: No more skipping stones, though!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Taiki is such a ball of energy.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Still, did she call me a "Nadeshiko gal"? What a
curious phrase...
choice_data_list: Maybe I'll start calling you that too.
You bridged a gap between Japan and America.
You bridged a gap between Japan and America.
"Nadeshiko gal" has a nice ring to it.
"Nadeshiko gal" has a nice ring to it.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Still, did she call me a "Nadeshiko gal"? What a
curious phrase...
choice_data_list: Maybe I'll start calling you that too.
You bridged a gap between Japan and America.
You bridged a gap between Japan and America.
"Nadeshiko gal" has a nice ring to it.
"Nadeshiko gal" has a nice ring to it.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Dear me... That would make things a little
awkward, wouldn't it?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Why, if you were to use that name, I might have
to follow suit and call you "Trainer Samurai"!
choice_data_list: Umm... Can't say I'm exactly a fan...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Right? Now, let's be on our way, Trainer
Samurai. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we set out back to the academy, I fervently
beg Grass Wonder to go back to addressing me
normally.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehehe. That's nice of you to say.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad that I was able to connect two places I
love.
choice_data_list: Tell me more about America sometime.
Tell me more about America sometime.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Gladly. You can rest assured this Nadeshiko gal
won't disappoint you.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Nothing would make me happier than to teach
you about my home. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder regales me with stories about
America all the way back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I've taken a liking to it.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I think I'm more of a Nadeshiko gal than a
traditional Yamato Nadeshiko.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'd actually love it if my fans could call me that
when they cheer for me at races, too.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: It really shows the inspiration I draw from both my homes—Grass Wonder, a Yamato lady and an American gal.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I'm counting on you, then.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Japan and the US. You and I. In each case, both
elements are essential.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
A single strand doesn't make a rope. With you by
my side, I believe it may come to be. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, I strengthened my determination to reach
the top with Grass Wonder.
